title: Deepen cooperation and build a better future together! On July 4, Mr. Chen from Shandong Dongfang Hongye Chemical Co., Ltd. led a team to visit Tianhui Plastic Group
contentHtml:
On July 4, Mr. Chen of Shandong Dongfang Hongye Chemical Co., Ltd. led a delegation led by Business Department Manager Wang and others to visit Tianhui Plastics Group. Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen, together with Yue Yunbo, Liu Yanjie, Zhou Wang and other senior group executives, warmly received them.

This year is the third year of cooperation between our company and Dongfang Hongye. Mr. Chen and his delegation have also visited our company for three consecutive years. During this trip, Mr. Chen expressed shock and surprise at the rapid development of our company, and was full of expectations for the Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Park, a project under construction by our company. Then we organized training for all business personnel of our company on Dongfang Hongye products. Through this training, our company's salesmen's understanding of Dongfang Hongye's products has been deepened. After the meeting, our company's salesmen asked and exchanged questions with Mr. Chen's team on a series of issues such as Dongfang Hongye's product performance. Mr. Chen said with emotion: After three years of cooperation,Witness the proactive attitude of Tianhui employees and the wise decisions of Tianhui’s leadership team.Witnessing the rapid changes in Tianhui, Dongfang Hongye firmly believes that the road of cooperation with Tianhui Group will become wider and wider, deepening cooperation and working together for the future!


[Mr. Chen and his delegation visited Tianhui E-commerce Logistics Park]


[Mr. Chen organized a special training for our company’s business personnel on Dongfang Hongye products]


[Our company’s business personnel asked questions and exchanged product knowledge with Mr. Chen]
titleZh: 深化合作，共襄未来！7月4日山东东方宏业化工有限公司陈总带队参观天晖塑料集团
contentHtmlZh:
7月4日，山东东方宏业化工有限公司陈总带领业务部王经理等人一行到访天晖塑料集团，集团董事长曾胜文携岳云波、刘艳杰、周旺等集团高层热情接待。

今年是我公司与东方宏业合作的第三个年头，陈总一行也是连续三年到访我公司。此次行程，陈总对我公司的迅速发展表示震惊和惊喜，对于我公司在建项目天晖电商物流园充满期待。随后就东方宏业产品对我公司全体业务人员组织培训。通过此次培训，加深了我公司业务员对东方宏业产品的认识。会后，我公司业务员就东方宏业产品性能等系列问题与陈总团队提问交流。陈总感慨道：三年合作，见证天晖员工积极进取的态度，见证天晖领导团队的英明决策，见证天晖日新月异的变化，东方宏业坚信与天晖集团的合作之路会越走越宽，深化合作，共襄未来！


【陈总一行参观天晖电商物流园】


【陈总就东方宏业产品对我公司业务人员组织专场培训】


【我公司业务人员与陈总就产品知识提问交流】
